user_claim: Customer: Morning. I parked near office and later noticed something off in the front. | Agent: Is this about one part or multiple parts? | Customer: Two things, I think. user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not sure which photo is clearest, but my side mirror is the issue. | Support: What happened to it? | Customer: It seems missing or broken after the car was parked outside. | Support: Should we ignore unrelated car photos if any? | Customer: Please focus on the side mirror claim.

claim_status_justification: The side mirror is clearly visible and undamaged in the provided images, contradicting the claim of it being missing or broken.

user_claim: Customer: Hi, I am not sure if I am filing this in the right place, so please bear with me for a minute. | Support: No problem, tell me what happened. | Customer: The weather was bad last night and I had parked outside because the covered parking was full. user_claim: Customer: Someone hit my car from behind, or at least that is what I think happened. | Agent: Which area should the reviewer inspect? | Customer: Rear bumper. | Agent: Is this a dent claim? | Customer: Yes, rear bumper dent. The photos are what I could take quickly.

claim_status_justification: The submitted images do not provide a clear view of the claimed rear bumper dent, so the claim cannot be verified.
